title: Joe Connor
compiled_truth: Joe Connor is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-20 to 2001-12-03), Joe Connor sent 9 and received 329 emails, totalling 338 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dan Staines](people/dan-staines) (6), [Sarah Novosel](people/sarah-novosel) (6), [Donna Fulton](people/donna-fulton) (5), [Steve Montovano](people/steve-montovano) (5), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (4). Mailbox folders observed: inbox, nerc.
